zh.lifeSummary: 當Margherita di Svevia於1230年出生在義大利普格利亞特拉 達特朗托武根托時，她的父親Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor36歲，母親Richina de Beilstein-Wolfsölden25歲。她於從1247年1月8日到1248年1月7日與IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1298年在義大利普格利亞享年68歲，埋葬在德國賀瑟福藍福特 阿姆 麥。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margherita di Svevia于1230年出生在意大利普格利亞特拉 達特朗托武根托时，她的父亲Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor36岁，母亲Richina de Beilstein-Wolfsölden25岁。她于从1247年1月8日到1248年1月7日与IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1298年在意大利普格利亞享年68岁，埋葬在德国賀瑟福藍福特 阿姆 麥。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Margherita
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margherita di Svevia was born in 1230, in Ugento, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italy, her father, Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor, was 36 and her mother, Richina de Beilstein-Wolfsölden, was 25. She married IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino from 8 January 1247 to 7 January 1248. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1298, in Puglia, Italy, at the age of 68, and was buried in Frankfurt, Hesse, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margherita di Svevia est née en 1230, à Ugento, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italie, son père, Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Richina de Beilstein-Wolfsölden, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino du 8 janvier 1247 au 7 janvier 1248. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1298, à Puglia, Italie, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Frankfurt am Main, Hessen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margherita di Svevia 1230 in Ugento, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor 36 und ihre Mutter Richina de Beilstein-Wolfsölden 25. Sie hat von 8. Januar 1247 bis 7. Januar 1248 IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1298 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Puglia, Italien und wurde in Frankfurt am Main, Hessen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margherita di Svevia è nata il nel 1230 nel Ugento, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italia, sua padre, Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Richina de Beilstein-Wolfsölden, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino da 8 gennaio 1247 a 7 gennaio 1248. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1298, nel Puglia, Italia, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Frankfurt am Main, Hessen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Margherita di Sveviaが1230年にイタリアプウグリアテラ ド'オトラントーウジェントーで生まれた時，父Frederick II Holy Roman Emperorは36歳，母Richina de Beilstein-Wolfsöldenは25歳であった。から1247年1月8日まで1248年1月7日にIX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquinoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1298年にイタリアプウグリアで68歳で死去し，ドイツヘセンフランクファート アム メインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margherita di Svevia(이)가 1230년 이탈리아 푸그리야 터라 드'트랜토 우전토에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Richina de Beilstein-Wolfsölden(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1247년 1월 8일부터 1248년 1월 7일까지 IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1298년 이탈리아 푸그리야에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 헤센 프랭k퍼트 아 맹에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margherita di Svevia nasceu em 1230, em Ugento, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Itália, seu pai, Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Richina de Beilstein-Wolfsölden, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino de 8 de janeiro de 1247 a 7 de janeiro de 1248. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1298, em Puglia, Itália, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Frankfurt am Main, Hessen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margherita di Svevia родилась в 1230 г. в местности удженто, тирра д'отранто, пугля, Италия, её отцу по имени Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Richina de Beilstein-Wolfsölden, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino с 8 января 1247 по 7 января 1248. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1298 г. в местности пугля, Италия в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности Франкфурт-на-Майне, Гессен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margherita di Svevia nació en 1230, en Ugento, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italia, su papá, Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Richina de Beilstein-Wolfsölden, tenía 25 años. Se casó con IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino desde 8 de enero de 1247 hasta 7 de enero de 1248. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1298, en Puglia, Italia, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Frankfurt am Main, Hessen, Alemania.
